title: Overgrown Tunnels
description: Makes the glacite tunnels overgrown instead of frozen.
body:
# SkyOcean - Overgrown Tunnels
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1296157888343179264?color=8c03fc&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/FsRc2GUwZR) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/dIczrQAR?style=flat&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean)
Overgrown tunnels changes the cold and frosty appearance of the glacite tunnels into a overgrown environment. By for example replacing the snow with moss or the ice with amethyst. ## Installation Guide - Prerequisites: [SkyOcean](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean) - You must also enable the option `Retexture Tunnels` - Download in your favourite launcher or into your resourcepacks folder directly
